name: Bjalfi the Contemptible
bio:
Physical Appearance: Nord male. Wears heavy armor including boots, cuirass, and greaves, with a possible pair of gauntlets. Wields Rockshatter, a mace that has been in his wife's family for many generations.
Race: Nord
Personality Keywords: treacherous, greedy, contemptible, ambitious
Role: Bjalfi the Contemptible was a warrior who lived at Whitmond Farm with his wife, Maeva the Buxom. He recently abandoned the farm and his wife, stealing Rockshatter - a precious family heirloom given to them by Maeva's father at their wedding. He has joined a gang of Marauders at Fort Strand to "find his fortune."
Home Location Information: Formerly Whitmond Farm. Now hiding out with Marauders in the depths of Fort Strand.
Daily Routine: Bjalfi wanders around Fort Strand without eating or sleeping.
The Stolen Heirloom: Rockshatter is a mace that has been in Maeva's family for many generations. Her father gave it to the couple as a wedding gift. Bjalfi snatched it from their mantle before abandoning his wife.
His Marriage: Maeva's father warned her that marrying Bjalfi was foolish, but she didn't listen. According to Maeva, he was a good man when she married him, but greed took hold of his heart.
Personality - The Fallen Husband: Bjalfi earned his epithet "the Contemptible" through his actions. He abandoned his wife and farm, stealing a precious family heirloom to pursue fortune with a gang of Marauders. His wife describes him as transformed by greed from the good man she married.
author: Bethesda
